title: lygodium articulatum
intro: Lygodium articulatum, also known as the Australian fern or jointed fork fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lygodiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lygodium articulatum include relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and skin problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lygodium articulatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
